bio: Ozzy was first spotted in November 2023. Called Ozzy because he was a bit of a 'wild child' hissing at everyone. He was tipped which was very handy as we couldn’t get close. Over the years he has definitely mellowed a bit. He loved attention now and will literally come running for food! Him and his mate ‘Oriel’ are mascots for the football players and have their own feeding station!
location: Behind the football pitches in Cluster O
